sources.claim: OpenTelemetry defines stable semantic conventions for recording exceptions in logs, supporting structured exception classification instead of free-text substring guessing.
OpenTelemetry describes events as named occurrences at instants in time with additional specifics, supporting explicit event/status modeling.
SLSA emphasizes provenance verification by inspecting artifacts rather than trusting unverified claims.
Regression testing retests changed and unchanged parts to ensure stability after a fix.
